Port of Tema, Ghana

Core Capabilities

Freight Forwarding & Logistics

We deliver customized logistics and transport services configured to your cargo requirements.

Import Operations

Complete customs clearance, warehousing, and delivery of sea and air freight arriving at the Tema Port or Kotoka International Airport.

Inquire Now →

Export Services

Exporting agricultural, mineral, and commercial cargo from Ghana worldwide. We handle documentation, consolidation, and booking.

Inquire Now →

Heavy Haulage & Road Transport

Modern fleet for inland haulage in Ghana and landlocked neighboring countries. Safely transporting standard containers and out-of-gauge cargo.

Inquire Now →

Transshipment Solutions

Handling and re-routing goods through Tema's port. Safe intermediate storage and rapid transit processing to transit markets like Burkina Faso, Mali, and Niger.

Inquire Now →
Local Hub, Global Impact

Tema Port: Gateway to West Africa

Situated in Tema, Ghana, Cadaps Logistics operates at the crossroads of major shipping lanes. The Port of Tema is one of the largest and most advanced maritime terminals in West Africa, offering key transit corridors inland.

We leverage our close proximity to port authorities, customs, and transport terminals to ensure your cargo clearing and freight forward processes happen without bottlenecks.

Years Experience

Cadaps Logistics Limited is a licensed custom clearing agent and freight forwarding firm based in Tema, Ghana.
